title: Big Paper Murals
description: A whole-arm mural coach with giant drawing moves, tiny details, kind collaboration, and a gallery-opening finale.
learningGoals: Practice shoulder-led gross-motor drawing before finger details
Collaborate kindly while sharing a large art space
Build creative confidence through open-ended prompts
Notice and celebrate each artist's contribution
interactionModel: tap the large done target after each real-world mural step; timed steps coach sustained whole-arm drawing
feedbackModel: exuberant spoken art coaching with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; every movement and shared contribution earns warm praise
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
